generated_oml:
instance RealTimeDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for real-time data collection from Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SensorDataTransmission
]

instance SensorDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RealTimeDataSensor
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo StateEstimatorAlgorithm, FaultDetectorAlgorithm, OptimizerAlgorithm, SupervisoryControllerAlgorithm
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model for structural dimensions using CAD"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADTool
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DifferentialEquationSimulation
]

instance CyberModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Cyber model representing control systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SupervisoryControllerAlgorithm
]

instance CADTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance DifferentialEquationSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based simulation for dynamic analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance FaultDetectorAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for detecting system anomalies"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimatorAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for estimating system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance OptimizerAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for optimizing system performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm for controlling system operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Assesses safety and operational efficiency using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OperationalEfficiencyInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reproduces and forecasts physical twin behavior through simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedStateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes system performance via optimizers"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls system operations through supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Identifies system anomalies through fault detection mechanisms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies system anomalies based on sensor data and models"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment of system safety"
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment of operational efficiency"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for optimizing system performance"
]

instance PredictedStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted system states based on simulation"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts Physical Twin based on control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that adjust parameters using sensor data; system performance is validated by monitors checking safety and optimality criteria."
]
